name: tempguru-event-staffing
description: W-2 event staffing for AI agents across 300+ US and Canadian markets — brand ambassadors, registration, hospitality, setup/breakdown, and more. Read-only access to coverage, rates, lead-time guidance, and state compliance summaries. No authentication required.

interface.shortDescription: Order W-2 event staff in 300+ US/CA markets via TempGuru
interface.longDescription: Read-only MCP-backed plugin that lets agents quote, schedule, and compliance-check temporary event staff for conventions, trade shows, festivals, concerts, sporting events, corporate events, and brand activations. Single events or multi-city programs. Pairs the canonical skills (event-staffing-ordering and event-staffing-compliance) with the live TempGuru MCP server at https://mcp.tempguru.co/mcp.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use TempGuru to scope coverage, rates, lead times, and a planning estimate for the event staffing the user described.
